result.stdout:
Usage:
  self-deploy [options] [command]

Options:
  --version         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information

Commands:
  create-private-key-json      Create a new private key for signing and verifying updates. YOU SHOULD KEEP THIS KEY IN A SAFE PLACE.
  upload-release-to-azure      Upload a new release to Azure storage
  install-from-url             Install app from published latest.jwt URL
  delete-release-from-azure    Delete a release version from Azure storage

Usage:

Options:
  --version         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information

Commands:
  create-private-key-json      Create a new private key for signing and verifying updates. YOU SHOULD KEEP THIS KEY IN A SAFE PLACE.
  upload-release-to-azure      Upload a new release to Azure storage
  install-from-url             Install app from published latest.jwt URL
  delete-release-from-azure    Delete a release version from Azure storage

result.stdout:
delete-release-from-azure:
  Delete a release version from Azure storage

Usage:
  self-deploy delete-release-from-azure [options]

Options:
  -c, --connection-string-file <connection-string-file> (REQUIRED)    Azure Blob Storage connection string
  -v, --version <version> (REQUIRED)                                  Version string
  -n, --container-name <container-name> (REQUIRED)                    Name of the target container
  -?, -h, --help                                                      Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
delete-release-from-azure:
  Delete a release version from Azure storage

Usage:
  self-deploy delete-release-from-azure [options]

Options:
  -c, --connection-string-file <connection-string-file> (REQUIRED)    Azure Blob Storage connection string
  -v, --version <version> (REQUIRED)                                  Version string
  -n, --container-name <container-name> (REQUIRED)                    Name of the target container
  -?, -h, --help                                                      Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
install-from-url:
  Install app from published latest.jwt URL

Usage:
  self-deploy install-from-url [options]

Options:
  -u, --url <url>                                                 URL pointing to a valid latest.jwt token
  -k, --public-key-json-file <public-key-json-file> (REQUIRED)    Path to public key file
  -i, --issuer <issuer> (REQUIRED)                                App issuer name
  -p, --install-path <install-path> (REQUIRED)                    Folder where you want to install the self-contained app
  -?, -h, --help                                                  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
install-from-url:
  Install app from published latest.jwt URL

Usage:
  self-deploy install-from-url [options]

Options:
  -u, --url <url>                                                 URL pointing to a valid latest.jwt token
  -k, --public-key-json-file <public-key-json-file> (REQUIRED)    Path to public key file
  -i, --issuer <issuer> (REQUIRED)                                App issuer name
  -p, --install-path <install-path> (REQUIRED)                    Folder where you want to install the self-contained app
  -?, -h, --help                                                  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
upload-release-to-azure:
  Upload a new release to Azure storage

Usage:
  self-deploy upload-release-to-azure [options]

Options:
  -p, --publish-path <publish-path> (REQUIRED)                        Folder where you published your self-contained app
  -c, --connection-string-file <connection-string-file> (REQUIRED)    Azure Blob Storage connection string
  -i, --issuer <issuer> (REQUIRED)                                    App issuer name
  -k, --private-key-json-file <private-key-json-file> (REQUIRED)      Path to private key file
  -v, --version <version> (REQUIRED)                                  Version string
  -r, --release-notes-file <release-notes-file>                       Release notes
  --is-pre-release, --pre-release                                     Mark as pre-release version
  -n, --container-name <container-name> (REQUIRED)                    Name of the target container
  -x, --placeholders <placeholders>                                   List of file names to be treated as placeholders
  -?, -h, --help                                                      Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
upload-release-to-azure:
  Upload a new release to Azure storage

Usage:
  self-deploy upload-release-to-azure [options]

Options:
  -p, --publish-path <publish-path> (REQUIRED)                        Folder where you published your self-contained app
  -c, --connection-string-file <connection-string-file> (REQUIRED)    Azure Blob Storage connection string
  -i, --issuer <issuer> (REQUIRED)                                    App issuer name
  -k, --private-key-json-file <private-key-json-file> (REQUIRED)      Path to private key file
  -v, --version <version> (REQUIRED)                                  Version string
  -r, --release-notes-file <release-notes-file>                       Release notes
  --is-pre-release, --pre-release                                     Mark as pre-release version
  -n, --container-name <container-name> (REQUIRED)                    Name of the target container
  -x, --placeholders <placeholders>                                   List of file names to be treated as placeholders
  -?, -h, --help                                                      Show help and usage information
